item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 10th June
item.description:
Fw pothole Stats required 304x300x30mm Give and take. Can park off rd (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsafe traffic lights and pedestrian crossing at a busy school junction., 10th June
item.description:
I would like to raise a formal complaint regarding the traffic lights and pedestrian crossing arrangements at the junction of Cheltenham Road and Pirton Lane. This junction is used every day by children travelling to and from two secondary schools and two primary schools. The traffic during school drop-off and pick-up times is extremely busy, yet the current layout is completely unsuitable and unsafe for pedestrians. The crossing is regularly used by parents with prams, young children, children on bicycles and scooters, elderly residents, and childminders supervising several children at once. However, pedestrians are expected to cross in less than six seconds, which is simply not realistic or safe. In addition, to reach the pedestrian crossing button, people must first cross the entrance to the petrol station, where vehicles turn directly in without any proper pedestrian protection measures in place. This creates a very dangerous situation. As far as I am aware, there have already been several incidents involving pedestrians being struck by vehicles at this location. During peak school times, vehicles attempting to enter the petrol station are often forced to stop in the middle of the junction while waiting for large groups of children to cross. This causes congestion, blocks the junction, and creates further safety concerns. I would be grateful if the following issues could be urgently reviewed and addressed: • The pedestrian crossing time is far too short (less than six seconds), making it impossible for many people to cross safely. • There is no safe pedestrian access across the petrol station entrance. • The crossing buttons and traffic lights do not appear to operate in sync on all sides of the junction, and pedestrians can sometimes wait over eight minutes to cross both roads. • Due to the excessive waiting times, many pedestrians choose to cross between moving traffic, significantly increasing the risk of serious accidents. I strongly believe this junction re
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Traffic lights changing when queue backed up at roundabout so traffic going other way cannot get through. Roadworks. 4 way lights., 10th June
item.description:
Gridlock with school/rush hour traffic as 4 way roadwork traffic lights allow a stream of cars to block so when they change, nothing can get the other way, as too close to mini-roundabout and junctions.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pirton Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
